calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William E. Gilg, Esq., Law Offices, 650-871-8647, specially appearing for defendant and moving party

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT ANTONIO ROCA Notice Of Motion For Order Vacating And Setting Aside Default And Default Judgment is Granted. Opposing party failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
